title: Cloud Portrait Webtoon Selfie Transform AI
sourceTitle: Cloud Portrait Webtoon Selfie Transform AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable reference selfie transform with reference-aware transformation that keeps identity and pose logic while changing style, setting, wardrobe, or finish. The portrait should look like the face is materializing from or melting into the clouds, with gentle diffused natural light casting soft highlights a. Keep the background a clean blue sky with soft gradient clouds. Reference Subjects: two people from the uploaded photo. Transformation. Style: cute Korean webtoon couple illustration with clean linework and soft blush shading. Selfie Setting: cozy cafe window selfie with warm reflections and subtle phone framing. Wardrobe Or Props: matching neutral cardigans, small hair accessories, and a simple phone case. Relationship Mood: natural affectionate closeness, casual smile, relaxed modern date energy. Identity Rule: preserve face shape, hairstyle impression, age impression, and relative height from the reference. Subject: Make two people from the uploaded photo the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in cozy cafe window selfie with warm reflections and subtle phone framing. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use selfie or reference-photo transformation framing that preserves face, proportions, pose logic, and relationship spacing. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in cute Korean webtoon couple illustration with clean linework and soft blush shading. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
